commit_scope: Add optional BMF object-rule choice receipts so BMF/BML compiler callers can witness choose_any and choose_best branch feedback without changing the hot matcher return path.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/bmf-choice-receipts.fk form-stdlib/tests/bmf-choice-receipt-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/bmf-choice-receipts.fk form-stdlib/tests/bmf-choice-receipt-band.fk

bmf-choice-receipt-band.fk binary artifact proof -> 67108863 with 1 ok, 0 divergent across Go, Rust, and TypeScript
New receipt proof passes in full-suite discovery mode
Full form validation reports 317 ok, 7 divergent; all 7 divergences are outside this change set and are recorded in full_suite_validation
local_validation.notes: The existing BMF matcher still returns match values directly. Receipt wrappers are explicit opt-in calls that build candidates from object-rule-set indexes, choose choose_any for direct-safe object alternatives, choose choose_best for indexed BMF/BML rule dispatch, and expose branch-feedback value separately from alignment, knowing, and trust.

full_suite_validation.summary: 317 ok, 7 divergent; new stdlib/bmf-choice-receipt-band.fk passed in discovery.

performance_measurements.interpretation: Existing hot-path medians stayed effectively flat in this startup-heavy harness. The new receipt proof pays only when callers request receipt construction.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BMF object choices can now be observed as CHOICE-RECEIPT values. Direct-safe object alternatives expose choose_any; indexed BMF/BML compiler dispatch exposes choose_best and selected branch signatures while preserving the existing direct matcher APIs.

phase_gate.reason: Focused local source and binary proof passed. CI, rebase, PR, and deploy verification are still pending; broader full-suite divergences remain outside this scoped change.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/bmf-choice-receipts.fk adds explicit BMF receipt wrappers and policy helpers while leaving apply-indexed-object-rule-set unchanged.

form/form-stdlib/tests/bmf-choice-receipt-band.fk proves choose_any for direct-safe object alternatives, choose_best for indexed BMF/BML dispatch, branch signatures, silence receipts, and separated CHOICE-VALUE branch feedback.
kernels/KERNEL_COMMON_GROUND.md records the BMF choice feed as the bridge from compiler dispatch into learned branch feedback, alignment, knowing, and trust.
kernels/BMF_BML_COMPILER_PICTURE.md records the opt-in receipt path and the preserved hot compiler path.
Before/after timing medians show existing BMF/BML compiler validation bands are effectively flat while receipt construction remains explicit.
